title: Student Financial Aid * African American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > Student Financial Aid * African American Community 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues African American Community Blindness Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND YOUTH PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers youth programs with interactive academic and real-world experiences that build leadership, life, and social skills, self-esteem, and cultural pride. Programs are designed to prepare students for success, encouraging post-secondary education and professional careers. Services include scholarship listings, job readiness training, employment support, and internship opportunities. 3934 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97212 Eligibility: Ages 12-25. Focuses on serving the African American community and additional communities of color. Hours: Hours vary Email (503) 280-2600 Get Directions Visit Website More Details URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND YOUTH PROGRAMS
